title: salix aurantiaca
intro: Salix aurantiaca, also known as the golden willow or orange willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree species within the willow family. The medicinal properties of Salix aurantiaca include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of salicylic acid and flavonoids. The health benefits of Salix aurantiaca include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce fever, and support the immune system, among other uses. Salix aurantiaca can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine for its wound-healing and antiseptic properties.
